message:
fix(bool): Use runtime.toBool for simple types to avoid error propagation

For simple types (bool, int, float, string, list, array, tuple, bytes),
use runtime.toBool() which doesn't return an error union. This allows
bool([]) to work inside void functions without needing try/catch.

For complex types that might have custom __bool__ methods, still use
boolBuiltinCall which returns !bool for proper TypeError propagation.
